epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Rome IV functional constipation criteria; red flag assessment for organic disease

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with structured bowel regimens and follow-up

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care management with referral pathways to pediatric gastroenterology for refractory cases
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Education, PEG-based regimens, toilet training support, dietary counseling
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Adherence and recurrence; service variability across member states
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong guideline-based care and access to effective therapies
